nodes.name: example.yaml
nodes.summary: Example benchmark definition for the sql_bench tool, showing the YAML schema with setup_sql, prepare_sql, benchmark_sql, conclude_sql, cleanup_sql phases and run count.

nodes.name: gap_fill_eowc.yaml
nodes.summary: SQL benchmark definition for testing the gap-fill function in end-of-window-close (EOWC) mode, measuring throughput of temporal gap-filling aggregations.

nodes.name: gap_fill_streaming.yaml
nodes.summary: SQL benchmark definition for testing the gap-fill function in streaming mode, measuring performance of continuous temporal interpolation queries.
